params.name: Ship of Theseus
params.description:
On Mar 10, 38 AD, Plutarch created this ship, which didn't exist in reality.
According to legend, Theseus, the mythical Greek founder-king of Athens, used the ship to return from Crete. After centuries of upkeep, every component of the Ship of Theseus had been replaced one by one. The Greek philosophers wondered if it was still the same ship.
